## [5.1.0-alpha.1](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/compare/v2.5.8...v5.1.0-alpha.1) (2025-10-14)


### Features

* allow option to choose to update entire page filter state ([0f4dee8](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/0f4dee89c6043d1f20da407ade50e0b24e59ffc4))
* allow option to choose to update entire page filter state ([a787f6c](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/a787f6c60b91c5ce8e2e187a5d327557761b2cf3))
* **DOMO-387867:** add function overrides for DDX Brick use (4.6.0) ([6187e34](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/6187e348d8d70a2bfcc8bc5593b2912d29e47f07))
* initial variablesUpdated event attempt ([e1c91b5](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/e1c91b5d87e9bfd048eca7a6359ef4663befa827))
* ios support for variableUpdatee ([#37](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/issues/37)) ([f65e969](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/f65e9691646a95029f9fc5e3ce7430afd61497b2))
* **onDataUpdate:** verify origin of data recieved ([#10](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/issues/10)) ([d5b8594](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/d5b8594f8baf8a220db1b3aaab449e819b081757))

### Bug Fixes

* add checking to onDataUpdate event listener ([#9](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/issues/9)) ([d4e07cd](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/d4e07cd4a801ee68f3df115f6adaee9fba98eca9))

* **onFiltersUpdate:** call each callback on event ([0aba05f](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/0aba05f0f0de23d2cccdf6be928a294bbc0c57c5))
* reverts some observer changes to fix file downloads ([ff08312](https://github.com/DomoApps/domo.js/commit/ff0831267b26f67d1963a62437419626e71f5c7d))

# v3.0.0
Converted to TypeScript

# v2.0.0
Parse the JSON response

# v1.0.0
Initial release.
Polyfill the Promise API for older browsers
`domo.get` - fetch a single data source
`domo.getAll` - fetch many data sources
`domo.env` - get environment variables
